title: Shadowed handoff finishing
body: Shadowed Dimming Veil has finished the cost-of-collaboration reviewer synthesis and mandatory live-TUI handoff updates. I am closing my file and git claims inside the self-contained handoff commit; after that commit, active claims should be empty. Next session should continue P5, then mandatory P8 live TUI before P6/P7 unless owner direction changes. I will not take WS1.4 in this session.
